title: indigofera kerstingii
intro: Indigofera kerstingii, also known as West African Indigo, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Indigofera kerstingii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Indigofera kerstingii may include infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
